patch.value:
## Context

File: src/core/sentry/instrument.ts:227 — `tracesSampleRate: 0.2` hardcoded in SentryModule.init.

The Sentry SDK supports SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE env var natively. There is no existing override path in the pm-cli initialization code.

## Acceptance criteria

- Either: (A) tracesSampleRate reads from SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE env var with 0.2 as the default; the env var is listed in the telemetry env-var docs (pm-r7md); OR (B) a code comment at instrument.ts:227 explains the rationale and documents that the value is intentionally static for this use case.
- Whichever option, no behavior change for existing installs.

## Evidence

src/core/sentry/instrument.ts:227 — hardcoded 0.2.
Sentry tracesSampleRate is hardcoded at 0.2 — expose as configurable knob or document intent

Sentry is initialized with tracesSampleRate: 0.2 (instrument.ts:227). This rate is not configurable via settings or env var, and is not documented anywhere. At 20% sampling, 80% of CLI command spans are dropped. For a low-volume developer CLI this may be appropriate, but if the install base grows or performance debugging requires full-trace coverage, there is no operational lever. The value should either be documented as intentional (with the reasoning) or wired to a SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE env var following Sentry SDK conventions.
Either env-var override supported or rationale comment present; no test required for the comment path.

- Either: (A) tracesSampleRate reads from SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE env var with 0.2 as the default; the env var is listed in the telemetry env-var docs (pm-r7md); OR (B) a code comment at instrument.ts:227 explains the rationale and documents that the value is intentionally static for this use case.
- Whichever option, no behavior change for existing installs.

value.note: Add resolveTracesSampleRate() reading SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE (default 0.2, clamped to [0,1])

patch.value: Document Sentry env vars incl SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE

value.note: Add resolveTracesSampleRate() reading SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE (default 0.2, clamped to [0,1])
resolveTracesSampleRate branch coverage + init wiring assertion

patch.value: Wired tracesSampleRate to SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE via resolveTracesSampleRate() (default 0.2, honours [0,1], falls back on invalid/out-of-range). Documented Sentry env vars in docs/CONFIGURATION.md.
Operators can tune or disable Sentry performance tracing without code changes; default behaviour unchanged.
SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE now controls the rate (0=off, 1=full); unset/invalid keeps 0.2. Coverage 100/100/100/100, docs updated.

Wired tracesSampleRate to SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE via resolveTracesSampleRate() (default 0.2, honours [0,1], falls back on invalid/out-of-range). Documented Sentry env vars in docs/CONFIGURATION.md.
